title: Adapt by capability, not device label
summary: Components declare supported inputs, presentations, attention contexts, accessibility preferences, environments, and fallbacks.
guidance: Preserve intent while adapting hierarchy and interaction; never assume hover, precision, motion, transparency, or a fixed viewport.
do: Publish a capability declaration and fallback
Test compact, regular, assistive, localized, and degraded states
dont: Treat mobile, desktop, and spatial as scaled skins
verification: capability declaration plus cross-input and adaptive-state tests
